title: Extra Move Animations (Cobblemon)
description: Not impressed with the current selection of moves with animations in Cobblemon? This pack adds some more!
body:
Are you not currently impressed with the selection of moves with animations in Cobblemon? *Cut them some slack, please,* but this pack aims to adds some more!

![Addon Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8ce202faf63454b92910b57e57ead751bce61f7.png)

As of the Latest Update **(`1.3.af`)**, these moves have animations:
- **Dragon Pulse**
- **Aura Sphere**
- **Make It Rain**
- **Bitter Blade**
- **Discharge**
- **Bulk Up**
- **Teleport**
- **Earthquake**
- **Twinkle Tackle (Z-Move)**
- **Self-Destruct**

You can expect around 1-2 (Maybe 3) new animations per update, decided by the members of the Cobblemon Discord from a selection of moves that I pick out.

This addon is both a Resource Pack and a Datapack as one file. The Resource Pack must be installed in your Resource Pack folder, or through **[Esc] -> Options -> Resource Packs**, while the Datapack must be installed in a Minecraft World's Datapack Folder, or through **More -> Data Packs** during world creation. ***(There is also an option to download it as a mod, for those who want to do that)***
